description: TechFinance B.V. — Netherlands — Interest — UNCERTAIN (MLI PPT + thin finance co.)
legal_notes: Dutch finance subsidiary. Netherlands: MLI PPT YES. Treaty interest rate: 5% (Art. 11(2) PL-NL DTC). Thin finance company — no independent risk management, no local employees beyond one director, on-lends to group at minimal margin. PPT risk: structure may exist primarily to channel interest payments through a treaty-favourable jurisdiction. BO condition (ii) unclear — contractual obligation to pass on cash flows to parent.

input.substance_notes: Dutch holding/finance company. Amsterdam registered office. One director (non-resident). No local employees. On-lends funds borrowed from parent to Polish subsidiary at a 0.2% margin. No independent credit risk management. Back-to-back loan structure: Dutch entity receives interest from Poland and remits (minus margin) to ultimate parent in a third country.
